subcodes.first_line: O thou exalted branch from the Tree of Eternity! The luminosity of God's Cause hath illumined the world with a brilliant morn and a manifest light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من دوحه البقاء نورانیت امرالله جهانرا بصبح منیر و نور مبین
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
